Title: Osney Bridge diversion Oxford
Description: Towpath closed about 150 yards before bridge, diversion via Abbey Road and Botley Road

Title: Marsh Lock footbridge closure Henley
Description: Bridge closed for safety. Diversion via A4155, approx 3 miles, 1.5 hours. Train/bus available.

Title: Abingdon Weir closure intermittent
Description: Walkway closed due to corrosion, rerouted via Abingdon town centre. May reopen if river level low.

Title: Sandford Footbridge closure near Oxford
Description: Weir damaged in 2022, repairs ongoing. Diversion via Preston Crowmarsh and Wallingford Bridge.

Title: Temple Footbridge closure near Marlow
Description: Environment Agency deemed bridge unsafe. Closed foreseeable future. Diversion via Bisham Abbey.

Title: Bell Weir Lock diversion Runnymede
Description: Thames Path diverted at Runnymede. Diversion via A308 pavements.

Title: Runnymede Bridge 142 closure Egham
Description: Diversion uses A308 pavements, 0.6 miles added distance. May extend until 2027.

Title: Penton Hook Island closure Runnymede
Description: No access to island due to diseased trees. Thames Path unaffected.

Title: Streatley-Goring towpath diversion
Description: Towpath closed due to narrow/flood-prone section. Diversion via Manor Road.

Title: Ten Foot Bridge closure Faringdon
Description: Status unconfirmed - no recent information found. Further investigation needed.

Title: Brentford Grand Union Canal disruption
Description: Path blocked on left bank between Brent bridge and Brentford Marina. Parts now open via alternatives.
